title: Surveillance of hepatitis D - Canada.ca
content:
## Surveillance of hepatitis D
Discover how hepatitis D is monitored.

## How many cases are there of hepatitis D around the world?
Worldwide, more than 5% of people with hepatitis B are also infected with hepatitis D.
Between 15 and 20 million people are thought to be co-infected or superinfected with hepatitis D worldwide.
The incidence of hepatitis D infection is extremely low in Canada.
Hepatitis D infections lead to death in 2% to 20% of cases.
